items.summary: Fix the `fetchAllMilkRecords` function in `frontend/src/lib/supabase.ts` so that fetching all records from the Supabase `MilkDB` table no longer throws a NetworkError. The current implementation uses native `fetch` directly against the Supabase REST endpoint. Update the fetch call to ensure correct headers are set (including `apikey` and `Authorization: Bearer <anon-key>` headers) and that the REST URL is properly formed (e.g., `https://ppebfdrluntbglqlreuz.supabase.co/rest/v1/MilkDB?select=*`). After the fix, the 'Download as Excel' button in `MilkDeliveryPanel.tsx` must successfully retrieve all rows and export them as a `.xlsx` file using SheetJS.
